title: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now generally available
body:
Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now generally available (GA), powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.

For release notes, see [Databricks Runtime 19](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/19) and [Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/19ml).
